manifest.changelog:
An AI-free version of Zain's Instafel Backup.

Based on Zain's Instafel Backup v35.2-hotfix.

Changes:-

• Removed Meta AI components wherever possible.

If you notice any remaining Meta AI-related features or components, please report them so they can be removed completely.
manifest.name: Zain's AI-less Backup
manifest.description: This backup maked for the newest features without Meta AI stuffs!
